name: eden-grill
description: Eden Grill POS - Thermal Receipt Printer with Cross-Platform Bluetooth

scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:www && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:open:android: npm run build:www && npx cap sync && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:open:ios: npm run build:www && npx cap sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:copy: npm run build:www && npx cap copy
